- Fix 1 (critical): Replace strcpy with bounds-checked strncpy in canreceiver.cpp

- Fix 4 (critical): Use Qt::QueuedConnection in mqttsender.cpp signal connections
- Fix 5 (moderate): Initialize isOnline=false in MqttClient constructor
- Fix 6 (moderate): Fix QVector double-size bug using qos_vect.begin() in mqttclient.cpp
- Fix 7 (moderate): Add bounds check in NmeaBuffer::getByte() in n2kparser.cpp
- Fix 8 (moderate): Replace deprecated QString::sprintf() with QString::asprintf()
- Fix 9 (moderate): Rename shadowed 'timeout' to 'windowTimeout' in meteocollector.cpp
- Fix 10 (moderate): Guard against division by zero in calculateTrend()

Docs versioning: Add glob support, better validation and reporting (#3278)

* Docs versioning: Add glob support, better validation and reporting

Normalize CLI target specs (handle Windows/backslashes, ./, absolute paths) and classify them as file/dir/glob. Implement matching logic and validation (report matched files and unmatched selectors, return rc=2 on unmatched), and apply target specs in scan/update. Add helpers (normalize_target_spec, compile_target_specs, validate_requested_targets, print_target_match_summary, iter_scan_candidate_paths) and adjust main argument help. Update tests to cover directory, glob, Windows-style paths, and CLI reporting.

* Handle invalid target specs in validation

Treat target specs that fail normalization as kind "invalid" so they are not silently ignored. compile_target_specs now appends invalid specs, target_spec_matches_path returns False for invalid kinds, and validate_requested_targets records invalid raw selectors as unmatched (and safely iterates when specs may be None). This ensures malformed or non-normalizable CLI selectors are reported back to the user rather than dropped.

* tests: add repo/cfg fixtures and refactor tests

Introduce shared pytest fixtures (repo, cfg) and import Callable to reduce repetition of tmp_path/git init logic across tests. Refactor many tests to use the new fixtures and ToolConfig factory, and add/adjust tests covering target validation and scanning edge cases (several validate_requested_targets variations, scan_files with invalid only-targets, and main returning 2 for invalid selector). Overall this centralizes repo/config setup and adds coverage for target handling behavior.

* Clarify --targets help text

Expand and clarify the --targets argument help strings in tools/docs_and_notebooks_check.py for the update and normalize subcommands. The updated messages document that --targets accepts exact files, directories, and glob patterns (with examples) and note that both '/' and '\\' path separators are accepted. This is a documentation-only change to improve user guidance; no functional behavior is altered.

* Update tools/docs_and_notebooks_check.py

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update docs_and_notebooks_check.py

* Revert "Merge branch 'cy/docs-versioning-tweaks' of https://github.com/DeepLabCut/DeepLabCut into cy/docs-versioning-tweaks"

This reverts commit 46fdb042e13eb7a968b0a1c4da0a6681cd9ef75a, reversing
changes made to 6d3b1be82255da0f832a4b47e0732507d52305d3.

* Use TypedDict for targets and simplify glob matching

Introduce TypedDict-based types for FileKind and TargetSpec (with TargetKind) and tighten type annotations across functions (compile_target_specs, target_spec_matches_path, target_matches). Replace PurePosixPath-based glob matching with fnmatch.fnmatchcase only to ensure consistent, shell-style pattern behavior across platforms and remove unused imports. Minor cleanups: import TypedDict and update variable type hints for better static checking and readability.

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial repository setup

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace 5s polling with Server-Sent Events (SSE)

- Add GET /api/notifications/stream endpoint (requireUserId) that keeps
  an SSE connection open per user with a 25s keep-alive ping
- Maintain sseClients Map (userId -> Set<res>) in server
- Add broadcastToUser() helper; call it after every mutation:
  new notification (both POST routes), delete, and action update
- Frontend: add connectSSE()/disconnectSSE() using EventSource;
  connectSSE called on login/session restore, disconnectSSE on logout
- On 'update' SSE event, call fetchNotifications() for a fresh render
- On SSE error, start a 30s fallback poll; clear it when SSE recovers
- Remove the unconditional setInterval(fetchNotifications, 5000)

* Switch to javax servlet APIs and Jetty 10

Replace Jakarta EE 5 servlet/JSP artifacts with Javax equivalents and target Servlet/JSP 4.0: update pom.xml to use javax.servlet:javax.servlet-api 4.0.1 and javax.servlet.jsp:javax.servlet.jsp-api 2.3.3, and downgrade jetty-maven-plugin from 11.0.20 to 10.0.20. steps.

commit.message:
Add Copilot CLI session capture (umx capture copilot)

New module umx/copilot_capture.py parses Copilot CLI events.jsonl logs
and imports user/assistant messages as umx sessions. Filters system-
injected content (<environment_context>, <current_datetime>, etc.)
and deduplicates messages.

CLI: umx capture copilot [--file PATH] [--source-root PATH] [--dry-run]
Defaults to latest session from ~/.copilot/session-state/.

Dogfood-verified: captured this session (84 events), ran dream pipeline,
extracted 127 facts, search works on captured content.

25 new tests, 236 total passing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: FLAC passthrough + pre-buffer for reduced playback latency

- Eliminate local ffmpeg transcoding: raw audio bytes (FLAC/MP3/AAC)
  pass directly from Yandex CDN to MA's ffmpeg
- Pre-buffer system: audio download starts on Ynison track change
  before the player HTTP GET, hiding API/CDN latency
- PluginSource audio_format changed from PCM_S16LE to FLAC
- Seek uses ffmpeg fallback only when needed
- Reduces playback start delay by ~3-5s (15-20s → 10-12s)
- 80 tests passing, 9 new tests for passthrough and pre-buffer

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: switch from host network to Docker bridge network

- Create dedicated 'anibt' bridge network for all services
- Only frontend (port 6868) exposed to host via port mapping
- Backend and PeerBanHelper isolated to internal network only
- Nginx proxies API requests to backend via Docker DNS (backend:8000)
- Update deploy.sh and test.sh to verify network isolation and connectivity
- Test script now validates: port isolation, internal DNS resolution, 26 checks total

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(tests): correct self-heal test assertions after R-002 fix

- test_no_self_heal: use mock_session.add.called instead of hasattr
  (hasattr always True on MagicMock objects)

commit.message:
Add custom audio focus management for reliable resume after interruptions

Replaced ExoPlayer's built-in audio focus handling with manual management:
- Request AUDIOFOCUS_GAIN when playback starts
- Pause on AUDIOFOCUS_LOSS and AUDIOFOCUS_LOSS_TRANSIENT with auto-resume
- Duck volume on AUDIOFOCUS_LOSS_TRANSIENT_CAN_DUCK
- Always resume playback when focus is regained (covers phone calls,
  navigation, assistant, and other audio interruptions)
- Added detailed AudioFocus logging for diagnostics

commit.message:
fix: Feed tab shows 'Link Connector' for already-connected agents + auto-fetch messages

Bug 1 (agents_sprint.py): GET /channel-messages returned has_connectors=False
for agents whose ConnectorAgent rows were missing (older agents or transient
creation failure). Add self-heal: on empty ConnectorAgent query, read
agent.config.connector_ids and idempotently create the missing rows. Handles
race conditions via IntegrityError catch (re-queries after rollback) and clears
connector_ids on general commit failure so the response stays accurate.

Bug 2 (AgentMessagesTab.tsx): Feed tab showed empty waiting state even when
Discord was connected because the local DB had no cached messages. Add a
one-shot backfill mutation (POST /channel-messages/backfill) that fires on
mount when has_connectors=True but messages=0. Shows 'Fetching latest messages
from Discord...' while in-flight. Uses a ref to prevent repeated calls.

Also imports IntegrityError from sqlalchemy.exc for precise exception handling.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Phase 3: webkit-jsi JS runtime for YouTube anti-throttle

Bundle yt-dlp-apple-webkit-jsi plugin for YouTube signature deobfuscation.
The plugin uses ctypes → libobjc → WKWebView → JavaScriptCore on iOS
to evaluate YouTube's obfuscated JS, preventing download throttling.

CI:
- pip install yt-dlp-apple-webkit-jsi in both build jobs
- Verify webkit_jsi.py present in packages and IPA bundle
- Verify _ctypes.framework present in Frameworks/

Python:
- check_js_runtime() diagnostic: tests ctypes import, plugin install,
  and availability using plugin's own IS_AVAIL + DarwinMinVer logic

Swift:
- checkJsRuntime method channel handler (runWithResult for GIL safety)

Flutter:
- checkJsRuntime() in LibraryManager
- _JsRuntimeSection in settings: shows ctypes, plugin, platform status
- Shows 'anti-throttle active' when all checks pass on iOS

Note: _ctypes.so is already in BeeWare Python-Apple-support 3.13-b13
and gets auto-converted to .framework by post_build.sh. No build
pipeline changes needed for the C extension itself.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

describe. The release workflow sets OSCAN_VERSION from the prepare

test: add 16 mutex, scheduling, and lifecycle tests (222 total)

- TestIssueMutexAdvanced: different issues parallel, manual bypass, mutex
  release after failure, queue monitoring with polling (4 tests)
- TestScheduledTasks: delay_seconds creation/validation, past datetime
  rejection, immediate vs future ordering (5 tests)
- TestBranchValidation: same branch rejected, no-MR mode, base branch (3 tests)
- TestTaskPriorityLevels: P0/P1/P2 all complete, invalid priority (2 tests)
- TestRapidTaskCreation: rapid webhook spam, rapid manual creation (2 tests)
- Added fail_git_clone flag to mock server for clone failure injection

Total: 222 mock integration tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Ⓜ feat: add configurable agent marker for send and edit messages (#40)

Add agentMarker parameter to sendMessage and editMessage actions that
prepends a configurable prefix to message content. Supports per-call
parameter override and TEAMS_AGENT_MARKER env var fallback.

Key behaviors:
- Parameter takes precedence over env var
- Empty string explicitly disables the marker
- Marker is not prepended to empty content
- For editMessage, marker is applied before reply guard annotation

Closes #25
Closes #29

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refine problem selector with iOS-style dropdown

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add circular prev/next tool navigation

- New data-driven TOML config (data/toolkit_nav.toml) — 17 tools in order
- New partial (tool-prev-next.html) auto-detects current tool page
- Embedded inside tool-hero — zero changes to individual tool templates
- Circular: first tool ← wraps to last, last → wraps to first
- Exact URL match prevents showing on single/child pages
- Soft white border pills, accent colour on hover
- Mobile: short names on small screens (<640px)
- To add a new tool: just add 5 lines to toolkit_nav.toml
